# Titan Cleaning Service

> Professional carpet, upholstery, tile, mattress, pressure washing, and floor waxing services in Victoria and Vancouver Island, BC, Canada.

## Business Details

- Name: Titan Cleaning Service
- Owner: Joanne Michaels
- Phone: (250) 710-5244
- Email: info@titancleaningservice.ca
- Website: https://titancleaningservice.ca
- Location: Victoria, BC, Canada
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7:30am-7:30pm, Sat 7:30am-3:00pm, Sun Closed
- Rating: 5.0 stars from 109+ Google reviews
- Minimum job: $280

## Service Areas

Victoria, Saanich, Langford, Sidney, Oak Bay, Colwood, Esquimalt, View Royal, Sooke, Metchosin, Mill Bay, Duncan, Cobble Hill, Shawnigan Lake, Nanaimo, Ladysmith

## Services and Pricing

- Carpet Cleaning: $0.60/sq ft. Stairs $5 each. Carpet protector $25/room. Odor removal $40/room. Pet spot treatment $3/spot.
- Upholstery Cleaning: Sectional $250, Sofa $150, Loveseat $125, Recliner $65, Ottoman $40, Dining Chair $30. Fabric protector $20/piece.
- Tile & Grout Cleaning: Residential $0.90/sq ft, Commercial $0.40/sq ft. Grout sealer available.
- Mattress Cleaning: King/Queen $99+, Double/Twin $80+. Mattress protector $20/piece.
- Pressure Washing: Concrete $0.25/sq ft. House/siding by quote. Sealer available.
- Floor Waxing & Stripping: Commercial $0.58/sq ft.

## Key Differentiators

- 100% satisfaction guarantee (15-day re-clean or refund policy)
- Eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning products safe for families and pets
- Low-moisture carpet cleaning system with 1-2 hour dry times
- Professional commercial-grade equipment
- Serving Vancouver Island since establishment in Victoria, BC
